title: Cosmic Portfolio v2
description: A high-performance cinematic developer portfolio built with Next.js 15, Three.js, and Aceternity UI. Features real-time content management via a custom-built Admin Dashboard and dynamic data fetching from MongoDB Atlas.

title: Panda Film Engine
description: A streamlined movie exploration platform leveraging high-speed image optimization and responsive design. Built to provide a friction-less browsing experience with instant search and dynamic UI cards.

title: Pi Vape E-Commerce
description: A sophisticated e-commerce showcase featuring localized UI patterns, smooth navigation powered by Framer Motion, and a highly responsive layout optimized for conversion and brand identity.

title: Feedback Cloud
description: A real-time customer feedback orchestration tool utilizing Firebase and Firestore. Engineered for speed and scalability, allowing businesses to capture and visualize user sentiment in real-time.

title: Pixel Forge UI
description: An advanced UI component laboratory exploring Material React patterns and interactive frontend states. Focused on crafting reusable, accessible, and high-performance React components.

title: Todo List App
description: A full-stack task management application built with React.js for the frontend, Node.js for the backend, and MongoDB for data storage. Features include task creation, updating, deletion, and real-time list rendering.
